user.title: Soccer Live setup
user.description:
Welcome to the Soccer Live configuration wizard.

Choose what you want to monitor:

- **League**: every match of a specific league (a knockout bracket sensor is created automatically for cup competitions).
- **Team**: matches of a specific team (select league first, then pick team).
- **Search team**: find a team by name across all competitions — no need to know the league.
- **All matches today**: every match in the world played today.
- **News**: news feed for a specific competition.
- **Manual entry**: enter the team ID manually.

data.selection: What do you want to monitor?

news_competition.title: News competition
news_competition.description: Select the competition you want to receive news for.

league.title: Select the league
league.description:
Pick the league you want to follow.

Matches of every team in the selected league will be displayed. For cup competitions (Champions League, Europa League, Coppa Italia, etc.) the knockout bracket sensor will be created automatically.

select_competition_for_team.title: Team — select league
select_competition_for_team.description:
Select the league the team you want to follow plays in.

In the next step you will pick the team from the list.

team.title: Select the team
team.description:
Pick the team you want to follow.

Only matches of the selected team will be shown.

manual_team.title: Manual team entry
manual_team.description:
Enter the team ID manually.

**How to find the Team ID:** open the team page on espn.com — the ID is the number in the URL: espn.com/soccer/team/_/id/**9723**/portland-timbers.

You can also provide a custom display name to identify it easily.

dates.title: Monitoring period
dates.description:
Specify the date range to monitor.

- **Start date**: when monitoring begins.
- **End date**: when monitoring stops.

Format: **YYYY-MM-DD**.

commentary.title: Live Commentary — select competition
commentary.description: Select the competition you want to receive live commentary for.

search_team_query.title: Search team
search_team_query.description:
Enter the name of the team you want to follow. Soccer Live will search across all competitions automatically — you don't need to know the league.

Examples: *Feyenoord*, *Arsenal*, *PSG*, *Real Madrid*.

search_team_results.title: Select team
search_team_results.description:
Pick the team from the search results below.

The sensor will track all competitions this team participates in.

error.no_results: No teams found — try a different spelling or use the full team name.

init.title: Soccer Live options
init.description: Tune the polling behavior and how long to keep the last finished match visible on the team card before switching to the next upcoming match.

data.enable_summary_enrichment: Fetch lineup, key events and H2H (summary enrichment)
